description_long: This is a tall, upright deciduous tree with a slender trunk and a moderately dense canopy of dark green foliage. The trunk is straight and relatively thin, supporting a branching structure that is more concentrated in the upper half of the tree. The leaves are broad and clustered, giving the tree a lush appearance, though there are visible gaps between some branches. The overall silhouette is somewhat columnar, with the foliage forming irregular, rounded masses. The bark appears textured and dark, contrasting with the vibrant green of the leaves. This tree would be commonly found lining urban streets, in parks, or as part of landscaped public spaces.
description: A tall, slender tree with a straight trunk and a moderately dense canopy of dark green, broad leaves. The foliage is clustered in rounded masses, giving the tree a lush yet airy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tree's upright trunk and a dense, vertically elongated canopy with foliage concentrated in the upper half.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the tree among others, highlighting its relatively narrow profile and the rounded, clustered nature of its foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the tree's columnar form, with two main clusters of foliage separated by a visible gap along the trunk.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the tree's irregular canopy outline and the distribution of leaves, with more visible gaps between branches.
